entry.title: New: BILL037(26) (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
TO AMEND PORTIONS (APPROXIMATELY 14.837 ACRES) OF THE STATE LAND USE DISTRICT BOUNDARY MAPS (SCHOFIELD QUADRANGLE AND ‘EWA QUADRANGLE) FROM THE AGRICULTURAL DISTRICT TO THE URBAN DISTRICT FOR CERTAIN LANDS SITUATED AT KAPOLEI AND HONOULIULI IN ‘EWA, OʻAHU, HAWAIʻI.

Latest action: Passed first reading.

View on the council site
